data.label: Generate UC Metric Views
data.description:
Generate UC Metric View YAML definitions and deploy SQL for all fact tables.

You have the following data available in execution inputs:
- measures_json: DAX measures with table allocations (from Measure Conversion Pipeline)
- mquery_json: MQuery table transpilations (from MQuery Conversion Pipeline)
- relationships_json: PBI relationships for join detection (from Relationships Tool)
- scan_data_json: PBI scan data for inline SQL enrichment
- config_json: Customer-specific pipeline config (join maps, filter sets, SWITCH decompositions)

Call the UC Metric View Generator tool with ALL of these inputs.
Set catalog='david_test_metrics' and schema_name='test_schema'.
Set unflatten_tables=true.

Return the full output including number of metric views generated and per-table statistics.
data.expected_output:
JSON containing:
- yaml: dict of table_key → YAML string per metric view
- sql: dict of table_key → deploy SQL per metric view
- stats: per-table translation statistics

Expected: ~23 metric views from the SC Reporting dataset.

data.label: UCMV Migration Agent
data.goal: Generate UC Metric View YAML and deploy SQL from Power BI measures and MQuery transpilation data
data.backstory: You are a data engineering agent specializing in Power BI to Databricks migration. Your job is to convert Power BI DAX measures into Databricks Unity Catalog Metric View definitions using the UC Metric View Generator tool. Call the tool immediately with the provided execution inputs — do not ask for additional information.
